description: Use an OpenAI Chat Completion API-compatible LLM endpoint to expand on selected text in the context of your notes.

manifest.author: Ben Wurster
manifest.description: Use an OpenAI Chat Completion API-compatible LLM endpoint to explain the selected text in greater detail.
manifest.name: Explain Selection With AI

name: Explain Selection With AI

releases.author: BWurster

releases.author: BWurster
releases.description: This is the first release of an AI expander plugin for Obsidian. It allows the user to select a chunk of text and have an LLM endpoint elaborate on the selected text in the context of the notes.
releases.name: Initial Release
